title: phaius longibracteatus
intro: Phaius longibracteatus, also known as the 'yellow ground orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaius longibracteatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Phaius longibracteatus is often used in tea or tincture form, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
